content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — user-visible toggle subtitle says "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order" (App/SettingsView.swift:12), which may trigger review questions about unfinished features.
Pierre: Apple rejects builds under 2.2 that present themselves as beta or incomplete, and this string is shown directly in Settings UI, not a developer log. The store metadata and release notes are clean (description.txt, release_notes.txt promote AI Sort with no beta language), so only the in-app copy raises the flag. Consider rewording to something like "Optional: sorting behavior may change" or removing the instability disclaimer before submission.
